testcase.name: reviewTrendingRouter > list > returns paginated items and count
reviewTrendingRouter > list > filters by statusFilter
reviewTrendingRouter > list > filters by platformFilter
reviewTrendingRouter > list > filters by autoVerdictFilter
reviewTrendingRouter > list > applies dateRange filter with from and to
reviewTrendingRouter > list > writes audit log: list_trending_review_queue
reviewTrendingRouter > list > readonly_admin can call list
reviewTrendingRouter > list > handles empty results correctly
reviewTrendingRouter > detail > returns full item with rawContent and autoScanResult
reviewTrendingRouter > detail > returns trendingItemId when approved
reviewTrendingRouter > detail > throws when item not found
reviewTrendingRouter > detail > readonly_admin can call detail
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > approves a pending item and creates trendingItem
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > calls update twice: status + trendingItemId (atomic)
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > trendingItem.create is called exactly once (LD-A-5)
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > writes audit log: trending_review_approve
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > throws already_approved when already approved (防双重入库)
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > throws already_has_trending_item when trendingItemId set (防双重入库)
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > throws when item not found
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > readonly_admin cannot approve → privilege_escalation
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > regular admin can approve
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > uses vendor from rawContent when not provided
reviewTrendingRouter > approve > uses input vendor when provided
reviewTrendingRouter > reject > rejects a pending item and updates status
reviewTrendingRouter > reject > writes audit log: trending_review_reject
reviewTrendingRouter > reject > throws already_rejected when already rejected
reviewTrendingRouter > reject > throws when item not found
reviewTrendingRouter > reject > rejectReason min 5 chars — zod validation
reviewTrendingRouter > reject > readonly_admin cannot reject → privilege_escalation
reviewTrendingRouter > reject > regular admin can reject
reviewTrendingRouter > batchAction > batch rejects multiple items successfully
reviewTrendingRouter > batchAction > batch approves items atomically (per item transaction)
reviewTrendingRouter > batchAction > each item gets its own audit log entry
reviewTrendingRouter > batchAction > zod rejects queueIds array with > 100 items (AC-10)
reviewTrendingRouter > batchAction > readonly_admin cannot batchAction → privilege_escalation
reviewTrendingRouter > batchAction > returns error for already-approved items in batch
reviewTrendingRouter > batchAction > returns error for not_found items in batch
reviewTrendingRouter > batchAction > returns error for already-rejected items in batch reject
reviewTrendingRouter > configRules > super_admin can update auto review rules
reviewTrendingRouter > configRules > writes audit log: auto_review_rule_update in config_change category
reviewTrendingRouter > configRules > regular admin cannot configRules → privilege_escalation
reviewTrendingRouter > configRules > readonly_admin cannot configRules → privilege_escalation
reviewTrendingRouter > configRules > privilege_escalation audit written for non-super_admin attempt
reviewTrendingRouter > configRules > upserts rule (create-or-update) using ruleType+ruleKey composite key
